name: Channel the Zenith
description: When you use Elemental Channeling, you may instead cast Moonbeam or Daylight without expending a spell slot or requiring concentration. Moonbeam lasts 1 minute and can be moved as a bonus action; Daylight counts as sunlight. Sunstride: until the end of your turn after activation, you provoke no opportunity attacks and the first time you hit with a weapon attack on that turn you deal additional radiant damage equal to your proficiency bonus.
